[Sheet: Scoring_Method]
Internship Company Ranking - Method
Generated on | 2026-06-27 17:28 UTC
User sorting rule followed | Online companies first, then Hybrid, then Offline. Within each group, companies with review/verification remarks were pushed lower.
Career assumption | Ranking optimized for B.Tech AIML/software internship value, not only stipend or distance.
Scoring factor | Weight
Mode preference | Online > Hybrid > Offline, as requested
Role relevance | AI/ML/software/product/IoT relevance ranked higher
Credibility | Official site, LinkedIn, company registration, clear address, public footprint
Learning value | Ment

product/IoT relevance ranked higher
Credibility | Official site, LinkedIn, company registration, clear address, public footprint
Learning value | Mentorship, real projects, deployable work, portfolio value
Risk/remarks | Negative reviews, weak public footprint, training-only model, unpaid/fee concerns lower score
Important disclaimer | This is based on public web information available during research. Before final selection, ask each company/college for written offer letter, stipend/fee terms, mentor, project title and deliverables.

Project Presentation
Problem Statement: Data & AI Challenge
Intelligent candidate Discovery
 Team Name: DEV DUO
 Team Leader: Vanam Jothik Krishna Siva Naga Sai Kanth


Solution Overview
What is your proposed solution?
APTIV (AI-Powered Potential, Talent, Intelligence & 
Vision) is an AI-driven Talent Intelligence Platform that 
evaluates candidates beyond resumes and keywords 
matching.
What dierentiates our approach?
●
Career DNA Analysis
●
Github & Portfolio Intelligence
●
Hidden Talent Discovery
●
Future Readiness Prediction
●
Explainable AI Ranking
●
Personalized Growth Roadmap
APTIV
The Future of Talent Intelligence

a structured framework:

Technical Skills:

●
Tools: Git, Docker, AWS, TensorFlow
●
Soft Skills: Leadership, Communication
●
Role Outcomes & Preferred Quals.
Enables comparison beyond simple keyword matching.

●
Resume & Project Experience
●
GitHub Activity & Portfolio Quality
●

Explainability & Data Validation
How are ranking decisions 
explained?
Every cand

ultiple candidate signals 
into a uniﬁed, actionable talent score.


Explainability & Data Validation
How are ranking decisions 
explained?
Every candidate score is 
explainable. APTIV shows 
the exact factors that 
inﬂuenced ranking, such 
as project quality, GitHub 
activity, and job role 
alignments. Recruiters 
can see why a candidate 
was ranked higher or 
lower.
How do you prevent 
hallucinations?
APTIV never relies on a 
single source. We validate 
information across 
resume, GitHub, LinkedIn, 
and portfolio evidence. If a 
claimed skill cannot be 
veriﬁed through 
supporting evidence, its 
conﬁdence score is 
reduced.
Handling Inconsistent 
Proﬁles
APTIV performs proﬁle 
validation. It detects 
missing info, 
inconsistencies, and weak 
evidence. Instead of 
rejection, the system 
l

stent 
Proﬁles
APTIV performs proﬁle 
validation. It detects 
missing info, 
inconsistencies, and weak 
evidence. Instead of 
rejection, the system 
lowers conﬁdence and 
provides 
recommendations for 
improvement.


End-to-End Workﬂow
Candidate Pipeline Process
The workﬂow begins with a **Job Description (JD)** 
input, which triggers a comprehensive multi-stage 
analysis.
●
**Requirement Extraction**: AI identiﬁes 
core needs from JD.
●
**Multi-Source Integration**: Analysis across 
Resumes, GitHub, and LinkedIn.
●
**Aptiv Intelligence**: Generation of Career 
DNA and Skill Gap analysis.
●
**Future Potential**: Predictive modeling for 
candidate growth.
●
**Explainable Ranking**: Transparent scoring 
via the AVA Recruiter Insights engine.


System Architecture
Talent Intelligence Platform

date growth.
●
**Explainable Ranking**: Transparent scoring 
via the AVA Recruiter Insights engine.


System Architecture
Talent Intelligence Platform
The APTIV platform follows a multi-layered architecture 
designed to transform raw candidate data into 
actionable hiring insights.
●
Data Ingestion: Resumes, LinkedIn, GitHub, and 
JDs are processed.
●
AI Engine: Performs skill extraction, Career DNA 
analysis, semantic matching, and ranking.
●
Knowledge Layer: Enables RAG for explainable AI 
and recruiter interactions.
●
Recruiter Interface: Dashboards and AI assistant 
for personalized recommendations.
Security and APIs ensure safe integration with HRMS, 
ATS, and external platforms.
Moving beyond traditional ATS with AI-driven intelligence and 
explainability.


Results & Performance
1.

on with HRMS, 
ATS, and external platforms.
Moving beyond traditional ATS with AI-driven intelligence and 
explainability.


Results & Performance
1. Ranking Quality
APTIV evaluates candidates via Career DNA, GitHub, LinkedIn, 
and Future Potential.
Key Results:
●
Identiﬁes high-potential talent missed by traditional ATS.
●
Explainable rankings with evidence-backed reasoning.
●
Detects Career Switchers & "Diamond-in-the-Rough" 
proﬁles.
Example Insight:
Traditional ATS favored high experience. APTIV ranked a "High 
Learning Velocity" candidate higher, predicting stronger growth.
2. Runtime & Constraints
Eicient Architecture:
●
Client-side parsing (PDF.js) reduces server load.
●
Lightweight semantic retrieval (RAG) vs expensive 
inference.
Performance Metrics:
●
Resume processing: < 2 seco

rsing (PDF.js) reduces server load.
●
Lightweight semantic retrieval (RAG) vs expensive 
inference.
Performance Metrics:
●
Resume processing: < 2 seconds.
●
RAG query response: ~1–3 seconds.
Cost Optimization:
Minimizes LLM usage by calling AI only for explanations, coaching, 
and recruiter chat.
Judge Pitch: APTIV discovers hidden talent via Career DNA while remaining lightweight, explainable, and scalable.
